hypothesis_en: Mr President, I would like to point out to the House that the honourable Member has made use of the right granted to him by the Rules of Procedure in Article 138 to express himself in the official language he prefers. Mr President, Mr Cigeiredo, Mrs Cigeiredo of the GUE Group, for three minutes, I would like to thank you very much for your speech.
reference_en: thank you very much Mr Joan i Marí I'd like to point out to the House (2.76) that the Honourable Member (2.15) was using his right under Rule a hundred thirty-eight to speak in ~the_ official language of his choice English is an official language and he is entitled to use it and he can intercalate phrases in Catalan which will not have been interpreted or therefore understood by the rest of the House (1.34) (1.22) and consequently they will not figure in the record of proceedings ((President starts speaking)) tiene la palabra a continuación el Señor Figuei= ((President stops speaking)) the next speaker is Mrs Mrs Figueiredo (1.43) from the GUE Group for three minutes
source_es: Joan i Marí quiero hacer observar a la Cámara ~que_ el Señor diputado ha hecho uso del derecho que le ~a_cuerda el Reglamento en el artículo ciento treinta y ocho de expresarse en la lengua oficial que prefiera el inglés es una lengua oficial y ha preferido utilizarla intercalando frases en catalán que no habrán podido ser traducidas y por lo tanto no habrán podido ser comprendidas por el resto de la Cámara (1.02) y por lo tanto no constarán tampoco en acta (1.81) (1.28) muchas gracias tiene la palabra a continuación el Señor Figueiredo la Señora la Señora Figueiredo del Grupo GUE por tres minutos
